title: palicourea longistipulata subsp. chrysorrhachis
intro: Palicourea longistipulata subsp. chrysorrhachis is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the 'yellow-stemmed palicourea'. It is a shrub-like plant native to the Amazon rainforest, and its leaves and stems have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, pain, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Palicourea longistipulata subsp. chrysorrhachis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
